rationale: Separate public layout from metadata composition.
Keep route while swapping to new template sections.
Separate routing from queries and reusable sections.
Dedicated solution templates and query layer.
Shared article rendering and locale support.
Clarify ownership of header, footer, breadcrumb and mobile nav.
Schema composition should not live inside page components.
Token-driven primitives and section components need clear boundary.
Separate Prisma reads from view transformations.
Static config and navigational IA should be versioned separately.
One factory for canonical, robots, OG and alternates.
Preserve route protection while removing public defaults and clarifying env requirements.
Logical isolation from public IA and template work.
Sitemap generation must consume explicit URL manifest and locale rules.
